title: pilosella densiflora subsp. neilreichii
intro: Pilosella densiflora subsp. neilreichii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Pilosella densiflora subsp. neilreichii are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used in folk medicine to support overall well-being and digestive health.
